Who We Are

CrewTEC — System Integrator & iValue Partner

CrewTEC is a premier technology system integrator headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka. We specialise in deploying and supporting enterprise-grade IT solutions across cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and data management.

As an authorised partner of iValue Group — one of India's leading value-added technology distributors — we bring 50+ world-class global technology brands directly to your organisation, backed by local expertise, professional services, and dedicated support.

🎯

Expert Consultation

We assess your environment and recommend the right solutions tailored to your business needs and budget.

⚙️

End-to-End Integration

From procurement to deployment, configuration, training, and ongoing support — we handle it all.

🤝

iValue Partnership

Authorised access to 50+ global technology brands across 15 solution categories through iValue Group.

📍

Local Presence

Headquartered in Bangalore with the ability to serve enterprises across India with on-site support.
